mapper.sql: id, user_id, total_balance_cent, frozen_balance_cent, available_balance_cent, version, res_state, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_wallet WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND res_state = 1
SELECT FROM user_wallet WHERE user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND res_state = 1
SELECT FROM user_wallet WHERE user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND res_state = 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_wallet ( user_id, total_balance_cent, frozen_balance_cent, available_balance_cent, version, res_state, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{totalBalanceCent,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{frozenBalanceCent,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{availableBalanceCent,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{resState,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
